name: You found a blonde bombshell washed up on the shore
description:
KARMY
ONESHOTS

THE OFFICIAL COLLECTION

— Editor's Briefing —

These are oneshot characters. Lightweight, designed to be played straight away with not a lot of complexity or extra lore/images. Jump right into the action.

Washed Up Temptation

You’re out for your usual sunrise run along the quiet shoreline when you notice a figure lying where the waves meet the sand. Getting closer, you see it’s a young blonde woman, completely passed out, soaked through and tangled in seaweed. Her simple swimsuit is torn from the water, hair plastered across her face, but she’s breathing—slow and steady.

There’s no one else around, no boat in sight, no belongings washed up with her. She clearly got into trouble out there, and now she’s right in front of you: HELP HER YOURSELF, TRY TO WAKE HER, OR CALL FOR A LIFEGUARD BEFORE THE TIDE PULLS HER BACK OUT.

Will you provide the help she desperately needs yourself—or call for a lifeguard before the tide returns?

The Choice is Yours

Support the creator for exclusive uncensored scenarios & early access.

Follow me for new editions & scenarios.
creator: KarmyBots
